[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011000011 4
1 111011011 7
2 100000001 2
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000011101 4

01 10 000011001 3
12 21 101000000 2
23 32 100100000 2
34 43 100000000 1
45 54 001000000 1

67 76 100000001 2 match 2
70 07 000000001 1
